app.name: NutriTrack
app.tagline: Track Your Nutrition, Transform Your Life

menu.googleFitDescription: Coming soon. Connect activity and health data later.

home.title: Welcome to NutriTrack
home.subtitle: Track your nutrition journey with elegance
home.description: Simple, powerful, and beautiful nutrition tracking. Search from millions of foods, track your macros, and reach your goals.

search.title: Smart Search
search.description: Search from 3 million+ products from Open Food Facts database

track.title: Track Everything
track.description: Monitor calories, macros, and micronutrients with detailed insights

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Smart caching for instant searches and offline functionality

multiPlatform.title: Multi-Platform
multiPlatform.description: Works seamlessly on web and mobile (Android coming soon)

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your data belongs to you. Secure, encrypted, and private

goals.title: Goal Tracking
goals.description: Set your targets and track your progress day by day

mobileHome.title: Track food fast, one thumb at a time.
mobileHome.copy: The mobile app is optimized for quick logging, scanning, and reviewing your day without desktop chrome.

quickAdd.title: Search and barcode flows are front and center.

glance.title: Calories and macros stay visible without scrolling through desktop UI.

touchFirst.title: Large hit targets, bottom navigation, and sheet-style product details.

auth.switchToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.successMessage: ✅ Account created! Please check your email to confirm your account.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.requestDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link if an account exists.
resetPassword.recoveryDescription: Choose a new password for your Nutri Track account.
resetPassword.emailSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset link.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This recovery link is invalid or expired. Request a new reset email below.

features.search: Search 3M+ foods from Open Food Facts
features.secure: Your data is private and secure

fastCapture.title: Fast capture
fastCapture.copy: Search or scan from the phone in a couple of taps.

privateAccount.title: Private account
privateAccount.copy: Your diary stays tied to your authenticated Supabase user.

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noItems: No foods logged yet for this day.

search.title: Search Food
search.endOfResults: You've reached the end of the results

scanner.title: Scan Barcode
scanner.formats: Supports EAN-13, UPC, Code-128, QR codes, and more
scanner.notSupported: Barcode scanning is not supported in this browser. Please use the manual entry option or try Chrome/Edge on Android.
scanner.unavailableHere: Barcode scanning is unavailable here. Use manual entry.

mobile.startTyping: Start typing to search Open Food Facts.

errors.productNotFound: Product not found. The barcode might not be in the database.
errors.cameraPermission: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access and try again.
errors.cameraAccessDisabled: Camera access is disabled for barcode scanning.

hero.title: Build reusable food lists for meals, groceries, or routines.
hero.copy: Create a list once, then add foods to it directly from search whenever you find something worth saving.

empty.title: No lists yet.
empty.copy: Create one to start saving foods outside the daily diary.

emptyList.title: This list is empty.
emptyList.copy: Use the button above to open search and start saving products into it.

errors.loginRequired: Please log in to add foods to your diary
